notes: Version 24.1 introduces a Material 3 Compose note-taking stack with a stable Theme pipeline, immutable note state, improved typography and text rendering controls, and performance instrumentation hooks for 120 Hz-ready UI polish.

versions.notes: Version 24.1 introduces a Material 3 Compose note-taking stack with a stable Theme pipeline, immutable note state, improved typography and text rendering controls, and performance instrumentation hooks for 120 Hz-ready UI polish.

Version 24.0 completes the pure-black OLED UI foundation milestone with the 23.x motion, menu, Notes, editor, dock, gesture, and runtime-used rhyme acceleration work packaged as the final release line.
Version 23.9 adds final pure-black chrome cleanup plus a local laptop QA plan for crash, screenshot, and jank testing paths without running emulator/device tests yet.
Version 23.8 clears the functional size gate with runtime-used rhyme acceleration data: an uncompressed prepared index and default expanded-rhyme hot cache with fallbacks.
Version 23.7 adds a shipped offline fast-rhyme hot cache with conservative default-only loader rules, keeping non-default settings on the existing scorer.
Version 23.6 polishes dock and gesture visuals with a fixed-height pure-black bottom dock, stronger neon active feedback, accent-aware icons/strokes, and refreshed swipe rails.
Version 23.5 unifies editor and rhyme surfaces with pure-black active-session chrome, black media/editor panels, sharper rhyme chips, and focused expanded-rhyme context.
Version 23.4 sharpens the Notes dashboard with pure-black current-session chrome, flatter note cards, fixed signal slots, thin accent rails, and safer long-title handling.
Version 23.3 rebuilds modal and menu surfaces around pure-black OLED command panels, current-session context, accent rails, thin neon separators, and a darker black scrim.
Version 23.2 centralizes the motion foundation with grouped timing specs and smoother panel, sheet, dock, swipe, and startup transitions while keeping tap response quick.
Version 23.1 keeps the Compose lifecycle host fix and removes the blue radar/tech backdrop so the app returns to a pure OLED black foundation with only UI neon/glow above it.
Version 23.0 completes the premium UI transformation with cohesive global chrome, live context status, refined dock tuning, and final OLED neon polish across the 22.x UI foundation.
Version 22.9 upgrades startup and preload visual identity with a premium OLED launch surface, crisp signal rails, refined status treatment, and unchanged rhyme preload behavior.
Version 22.8 upgrades settings and personalization with preview-first color, font, glow, and rhyme-setting controls, clearer live previews, and tighter premium sheet spacing.
Version 22.7 tunes gestures and motion with larger edge hitboxes, shared swipe completion helpers, faster sheet/dock/tap feedback, and consistent workflow animation paths.
Version 22.6 rebuilds bottom sheets and menus as premium OLED command panels with stronger handles, command-row menu surfaces, refined style/font/glow sheets, and cleaner update chooser cards.
Version 22.5 adds bundled OFL Google Fonts assets for Space Grotesk, Share Tech Mono, and Silkscreen, wired into editor rendering and font previews with fallback-safe loading.
Version 22.4 upgrades the editor into a premium Draft Studio surface with editor chrome, accent rail, compact session metadata, note-accent signal detail, and refined title/body field surfaces.
Version 22.3 upgrades the Notes home into a premium session dashboard with stronger current-session context, richer note cards, accent rails, compact metadata/previews, and crisp signal markers.
Version 22.2 begins the Compose-led premium shell with a true-black OLED studio backdrop, crisp neon rails, waveform marks, and fine grid detail behind the existing app workflows.
Version 22.1 adds multi-version update discovery, keeps legacy appcast compatibility, and shows a premium OLED chooser when several newer builds are available.
